title: Angel Investor Readiness
promise: Angel investor maturity diagnostic for thesis, diligence, portfolio construction, and governance.
audience: Prospective and active angel investors, founder-angels, and investment clubs
description: Investor maturity assessment across Thesis & Boundaries, Deal Flow & Diligence, Portfolio Discipline, Support & Governance. Four-dimensional radar result, balanced index, level label, strongest-dimension archetype, weakest-dimension 30-day action, and separate evidence-confidence checks.
ogDescription: Angel investor maturity diagnostic for thesis, diligence, portfolio construction, and governance.
